questions.enonce: Which term best describes the movement of people across the globe today?
Digital connectivity means people no longer need to move physically.
The {{1}} of global trade has made countries more interdependent.

pairs.right: Ability to move easily and freely
Who a person is or what a thing is
Group of people living in the same place or having a particular characteristic in common

questions.enonce: What is the ultimate goal of studying 'Mobility and Territory'?
options: To understand how humans interact with their environment and each other globally
